scripts.postinstall: prisma generate --schema=../backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node -e "const {cpSync}=require('fs');cpSync('../backend/node_modules/@prisma/client','./node_modules/@prisma/client',{recursive:true,force:true});cpSync('../backend/node_modules/.prisma','./node_modules/.prisma',{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Prisma client synced to electron/node_modules')"
scripts.sign:mac: codesign --deep --force --sign - --entitlements entitlements.plist 'dist/mac-arm64/The Manager.app' && codesign --deep --force --sign - --entitlements entitlements.plist 'dist/mac/The Manager.app' 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.dmg:mac: hdiutil create -volname 'The Manager' -srcfolder 'dist/mac-arm64/The Manager.app' -ov -format UDZO 'dist/The Manager-arm64-signed.dmg' && echo 'DMG rebuilt with signed app'
scripts.build:mac: npm run sync:prisma && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac && npm run sign:mac && npm run dmg:mac
scripts.build:win: npm run sync:prisma && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win
scripts.build:win:installer: npm run sync:prisma && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config.win.target=nsis
